first.name: Volodymyr
first.sub-title: Building web applications with Vue, Nuxt, and Node.js. Focused on scalable and user-friendly solutions.

about.title: About Me
about.sub-title: Full Stack Developer with 3+ years of experience building web applications that solve real business problems.
about.p1: My journey in software development started with curiosity about how web applications work behind the scenes. Over time, it evolved into hands-on experience — today I build fullstack solutions from user interfaces to backend logic and databases.
about.p2: I specialize in developing e-commerce platforms, admin panels, landing pages, and real-time applications (such as chat systems and WebSocket-based features). I work with both frontend (Vue, Nuxt) and backend (Node.js, APIs, databases), ensuring systems are stable, scalable, and well-structured.
about.p3: I focus on writing clean, maintainable code, designing clear architecture, and using modern development practices. My goal is to build fast, user-friendly, and scalable applications.
about.p4: I continuously improve my skills, focusing on TypeScript, backend development, and software architecture. I have experience delivering commercial projects — from individual features to complete applications.
about.li1: 3+ years of practical experience in web development
about.li2: Development of e-commerce platforms, admin panels, landing pages, and real-time applications
about.li4: Experience delivering commercial projects and business solutions
about.li5: Strong understanding of client-server architecture and REST APIs
about.li6: Modern tech stack (Composition API, Pinia, JWT, Docker)
about.li7: Ability to independently deliver features from idea to production

skills.title: Skills & Technologies
skills.sub-title: A comprehensive toolkit for building modern scalable applications across the full technology stack.

skills.fr1: Developing responsive and interactive user interfaces

skills.bac1: Building REST APIs and real-time functionality with WebSocket

skills.db3: Designing robust data schemas for applications
skills.dev3: API testing and debugging with Postman
skills.dev4: Email integration with Nodemailer and server configuration

proj.title: Featured Projects
proj.sub-title: Projects that demonstrate my full stack development skills from concept to deployment.
proj.ag-desc: Real-time cryptocurrency aggregator built with Nuxt.js and Node.js (two-server architecture). Provides live price tracking, market data, and analytics with scalable backend and high performance.
proj.st-desc: E-commerce web application built with Vue and Node.js. Includes product catalog, filtering, authentication, and admin features.
proj.ger-desc: Multi-page restaurant website built with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Features responsive design and structured content.
proj.bs-desc: Multi-page barber shop website focused on usability, responsive layout, and clean design.

touch.title: Get In Touch
touch.sub-title: Interested in working together? Tell me about your project and let's discuss how I can help.
touch.min-sub-title: I'm open to new opportunities and collaborations. Feel free to reach out.

seo.text-footer: Full Stack Developer specializing in Vue.js, Node.js, MySQL, and WebSocket technologies. Building scalable web applications, APIs, and real-time systems with clean architecture.
seo.ogDescription: Building scalable web apps with Vue, Nuxt, Node.js

p-crypto.title: Crypto Aggregator (Nuxt.js + Node.js)
p-crypto.sub-title: A real-time cryptocurrency aggregator that provides live price tracking, analytics, and market data using a scalable backend architecture.
p-crypto.p-1: This project is built to monitor cryptocurrency prices in real time using modern web technologies like Nuxt 3 and Node.js.
p-crypto.p-2: The application uses a two-server architecture: a frontend built with Nuxt and a backend API handling data processing and WebSocket connections.
p-crypto.p-3: One of the key challenges was handling real-time updates efficiently. This was solved using WebSocket connections and optimized data flow.
p-crypto.p-4: This project demonstrates strong full stack development skills including real-time systems, scalable backend architecture, and modern frontend development.

p-store.title: E-Commerce Web Application (Vue.js + Node.js)
p-store.sub-title: A full-featured e-commerce web application with product catalog, filtering, authentication, and responsive UI. Built using Vue.js and Node.js with a focus on usability and performance.
p-store.p-1: This project is a multi-page e-commerce web application designed to simulate a real online store. It includes product browsing, filtering, and user interaction features built with modern web technologies.
p-store.li-1: Product catalog with filtering and search
p-store.li-3: Responsive UI optimized for all devices
p-store.p-2: The application follows a client-server architecture with a Vue.js frontend and a Node.js backend handling business logic, routing, and user data management.
p-store.p-3: One of the main challenges was building a scalable and user-friendly product filtering system. This was solved by optimizing state management and structuring components for maintainability.
p-store.p-4: This project demonstrates full stack development skills including building e-commerce applications, managing user interactions, and creating scalable and maintainable web architectures.

p-gericht.title: Restaurant Website (HTML, CSS, JavaScript)
p-gericht.sub-title: A modern multi-page restaurant website with responsive design, smooth animations, and structured content. Built using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript with a focus on user experience and visual presentation.
p-gericht.p-1: This project is a restaurant website designed to showcase menu, services, and brand identity. It focuses on clean layout, responsive design, and smooth user interaction.
p-gericht.li-3: Structured sections for menu and content
p-gericht.li-4: Optimized UI for mobile and desktop
p-gericht.p-2: The project is built using semantic HTML structure, modern CSS styling, and JavaScript for interactivity and animations.
p-gericht.p-3: A key challenge was creating a visually appealing layout while maintaining performance and responsiveness. This was achieved through optimized CSS and structured components.
p-gericht.p-4: This project demonstrates frontend development skills including responsive design, UI/UX implementation, and building visually engaging landing pages.

p-barber.title: Barbershop Website (HTML, CSS, JavaScript)
p-barber.sub-title: A modern barbershop website with responsive design, service sections, and user-focused layout. Built using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript with a focus on usability and conversion.
p-barber.p-1: This project is a barbershop website designed to present services, pricing, and brand identity. It focuses on clean layout, user experience, and accessibility across devices.
p-barber.li-1: Responsive layout for mobile and desktop
p-barber.p-2: The website is built using semantic HTML, modern CSS styling, and JavaScript for interactive elements and smooth user experience.
p-barber.p-3: The main challenge was designing a clean and conversion-focused layout. This was solved by structuring content clearly and emphasizing key user actions such as booking or contact.
p-barber.p-4: This project demonstrates frontend development skills including responsive design, UI/UX implementation, and building service-oriented landing pages.
